_comment: Research projects. Cards show title, sponsor, collaborators, and (if present) a description. No outbound links by design — add a 'description' string to any project to populate the card body. Set "earlier": true on an item to move it into the collapsed 'Completed projects' disclosure below the main grid.

items.title: Utilization of Existing Pipelines in Hydrogen Transport
Capacity Building to Enhance the Understanding of Process, Structure, and Property Relationships of Ultra-High Temperature Materials for Extreme Environments
CAREER: Understanding and controlling the sintering of metal powders with nanoscale additives
BIG: Building Intelligent Gradients in additively manufactured space engine materials via a multiscale predictive framework
Surface smoothing by a transient liquid phase for increased fatigue life
MRI: Acquisition of Compact Mechanical Testing System for Structural, Archaeological, and High-Temperature Materials

funders.alt: Logos of AMDG sponsors and partners: NSF, Office of Naval Research, AFOSR, NASA, ERDC, ASME, SMST (ASM International), Confluent Medical Technologies, Veeco, the International Digital Image Correlation Society, and The University of Tulsa.
funders.heading: Sponsors & Partners
